alm.default_command_text: [Auto-Login] No password configured. Use /alm set <password> or /alm register <password>
alm.command.help.text:
[Auto-Login] Commands:
/alm set <password> - Global /login for all servers
/alm register <password> - Global /register for all servers
/alm add <ip> <password> - Per-server /login setting
/alm autotype - Toggle auto-login on join
/alm list - Show settings
/alm remove <ip> - Remove per-server setting
/alm help - Show help
F9 = Manual login
Smart Auto-Detect = Auto-detects /login or /register from server messages
